auth.heroText: Products, vendors, inventory, orders, payouts, shipping and customers in one professional ecommerce operations dashboard.
auth.secureSignInText: Use the same login for admin and vendor accounts.
auth.forgotInfo: Enter your account email. Reset flow will connect to API later.
auth.resetInfo: Create a strong new password for your Mahi Store account.

dashboard.heroTitle: Manage sales, vendors, orders and payouts from one enterprise dashboard.
dashboard.heroText: This dashboard will connect to Supabase data after API integration.

finance.commissionsDescription: Manage global, vendor-specific and category-based marketplace commission.

inventoryPage.title: Inventory
inventoryPage.description: Monitor product stock, low stock alerts and warehouse availability.
inventoryPage.searchPlaceholder: Search stock by product, SKU, vendor...
inventoryPage.stockAdjustmentText: Increase or decrease product stock with reason tracking.
inventoryPage.reasonPlaceholder: Stock received from supplier / damaged / correction

ordersPage.title: Orders
ordersPage.description: Manage customer orders, vendor fulfillment and delivery status.
ordersPage.vendorAssignedAutomatically: Vendor will be assigned automatically from current account.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search products by name, SKU, vendor...
productsPage.productVariantText: Product ID #{{id}} — manage variant price, SKU and stock.
productsPage.createText: Create product with pricing, stock, vendor and marketplace settings.
productsPage.vendorAssignmentNote: Admin can assign this product to any vendor. Vendor will only see assigned products.

reviewsPage.title: Reviews
reviewsPage.description: Moderate product and store reviews before publishing.
reviewsPage.goodScentLateDelivery: Good scent but delivery was late.

shippingPage.title: Shipping
shippingPage.description: Manage shipping zones, delivery methods, rates and courier rules.

storesPage.title: Stores
storesPage.description: Manage vendor storefronts, status, ratings and product counts.
storesPage.createDescription: Create a vendor storefront with commission, contact and SEO settings.
storesPage.ratingText: Based on product and store reviews
storesPage.activityNewOrder: New order received from customer Ahmed Raza

transactionsPage.title: Transactions
transactionsPage.description: Track COD, paid, failed, refunded and vendor payment transactions.

vendorsPage.title: Vendors
vendorsPage.createDescription: Create vendor account, store profile, commission and payout settings.

customers.title: Vendor Customers
customers.description: Customers who purchased products from your vendor store.
customers.customerDetailDescription: View vendor-specific customer profile, order history and return activity.
customers.notePlaceholder: Internal vendor note about this customer...
customers.noteDefault: Frequent buyer, prefers fast delivery and usually orders electronics accessories.
customers.customerListDescription: View buyer profiles, order history and customer activity
customers.orderHistoryDescription: Orders placed with this vendor store

finance.earningsDescription: Track gross sales, commission deductions and net vendor earnings.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Create payout requests and view payout history.
payouts.requestDescription: Submit a withdrawal request from your available vendor wallet balance.
payouts.balanceHelp: Your payout request cannot exceed available wallet balance.
payouts.detailDescription: View payout request details, method, status and admin processing notes.
payouts.vendorNoteText: Please process payout to my listed bank account.
payouts.adminNoteText: Payout is under review by finance team.

wallet.transactionsDescription: View all wallet credits, deductions, payout requests and commission movements.
wallet.title: Vendor Wallet
wallet.description: View your available balance, pending balance and wallet movements.
wallet.currentWalletHelp: This amount is available for payout request.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Manage your product stock, reserved quantity, low-stock alerts and movement logs.
inventory.lowStockDescription: Products that need restocking based on vendor stock threshold.
inventory.adjustmentDescription: Increase, decrease or correct product stock with movement notes.
inventory.logsDescription: Complete stock movement history for your vendor products.
inventory.movementLogsDescription: Stock increases, decreases, corrections, returns and order deductions

orders.title: Vendor Orders
orders.description: Manage all orders assigned to your vendor store.
orders.detailDescription: View order details, customer information, shipping data and update fulfillment status.
orders.orderListDescription: Search, view and update vendor orders

returns.title: Returns
returns.description: Manage return requests for your vendor orders.
returns.detailDescription: Review return request, update approval status and add vendor notes.
returns.returnRequestsDescription: Approve, reject and track return requests
returns.customerReasonText: Product arrived damaged and mouse click is not working correctly.
returns.approveReturnText: Accept return request for admin processing.
returns.rejectReturnText: Reject request with a clear vendor note.

reviews.title: Product Reviews
reviews.description: View customer reviews and reply to product feedback.

coupons.title: Vendor Coupons
coupons.description: Create vendor-specific discount coupons for your products and store campaigns.
coupons.couponListDescription: Vendor coupon codes and usage limits

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: View order, inventory, payout and marketplace updates.
notifications.newOrderMessage: Order #ORD-10021 has been assigned to your store.
notifications.payoutMessage: Your payout request PAY-3001 is under review.
notifications.lowStockMessage: Bluetooth Speaker is currently out of stock.

settings.title: Vendor Settings
settings.description: Manage vendor account, password, notification preferences and store controls.
settings.accountDescription: Update your account identity and access information.
settings.orderNotificationsDesc: Receive alerts when new orders arrive.
settings.lowStockAlertsDesc: Get notified when products reach low-stock threshold.
settings.payoutUpdatesDesc: Receive updates when payout status changes.
settings.reviewAlertsDesc: Receive alerts for new product reviews.

shipping.title: Shipping Settings
shipping.description: Create and manage vendor-specific shipping zones, rules and courier options.

dashboard.title: Vendor Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your products, orders, earnings and store performance.

storeProfile.title: Store Profile
storeProfile.defaultDescription: We provide premium quality products with fast delivery.

attributes.title: Product Attributes
attributes.description: Create and manage product attributes for variants such as color, size, material and storage.
attributes.formDescription: Add product attributes and values for vendor product variants.
attributes.usageText: Attributes are used to generate product variants. Example: Color + Size can create Black/S, Black/M, Red/L.
attributes.recommendedText: Color, Size, Material, Storage, Weight, Model.

brands.title: Vendor Brands
brands.description: Create and manage your own product brands.
brands.formDescription: Add or update vendor product brand.
brands.approvalText: Vendor brands can be used in products. Admin may review and approve/reject public visibility.

categories.title: Vendor Categories
categories.description: Create and manage your own product categories.
categories.formDescription: Add or update vendor product category.
categories.rulesText: Vendor categories can be used while creating products. Admin can still moderate visibility later.
